title: cassine micrantha
intro: Cassine micrantha, also known as the small-leaved cassine or cassine, is a plant species within the Rhamnaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in South Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cassine micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, relieve joint pain, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
